title: 6pc Universal Tool Heavy Duty Leather Hollow Punch Set
description:
The 6pc Hollow Punch Set is ideal for leather working and for making clean holes in tough materials such as gaskets, leather, plastic, rubber and vinyl. It's great for all sorts of craft projects. Each unit is 3.5" in length, constructed from heavy duty stainless steel, and has a knurled body for a secure grip, making them not only super effective, but also conveniently easy to use. Be sure to keep this handy set around the house for any projects you take on! Punch sizes include with this 6pc set are: 5/16 inch (8mm), 1/4 inch (6.5mm), 7/32 inch (5.5mm), 3/16 inch (5mm), 5/32 inch (4mm) and 1/8 inch (3mm).

6pc Universal Tool Heavy Duty Leather Hollow Punch Set

The 6pc Hollow Punch Set is ideal for leather working and for making clean holes in tough materials such as gaskets, leather, plastic, rubber and vinyl. It's great for all sorts of craft projects.

Key Features

  • Knurled Bodies for Secure Grip
  • Length: 3.5"
  • (6) Hollow Punches: 1/8", 5/32", 3/16", 7/32", ¼", 5/16"
  • Precision Cutting Edges
  • Color: Silver

Product Specifications

  • MPN: LP-6-416
  • UPC: 144212198350
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: Compact
